divergences.claim: TtlPolicy.lifetime_seconds returns the entry lifetime in seconds. The default policy uses a 30-second TTL, so lifetime_seconds() returns 30: a cached entry is considered fresh for 30 seconds after it is written, and a warmer must refresh at least once every 30 seconds.
divergences.prose: TtlPolicy.lifetime_seconds returns the entry lifetime in seconds. The default policy uses a 30-second TTL, so lifetime_seconds() returns 30: a cached entry is considered fresh for 30 seconds after it is written, and a warmer must refresh at least once every 30 seconds.
